pageContext.name: Deathstrokez "50 Shadez"
pageContext.description: Guggimon's Chop Chop is back and he has one simple message: FCK COLOR!  Deathstrokez 50 Shadez is 10' of homie-cidal tendencies without a lick of color to hold him back. This next-level genius saw his predecessors getting dragged through the mud of every fashion blog in a 'who wore it better' war with some loser rat and realized Color is Trouble. So now it's back to basics and the only color you should expect to see is whatever he drains from your face.  Don't miss your chance to add this designer collectible to your collection today!
